pages.text: Three enchantments support the lifesteal theme. Each reaches level 3 on any main hand weapon, and the three are mutually exclusive, so one weapon can carry only one of them at a time.
Vampirism converts a share of damage dealt into healing for the attacker, scaling with level. It is the most balanced of the three, suited to general combat.
Life Steal goes further than Vampirism by transferring the victim's missing max hearts to the attacker on a killing blow. Use it in PvP to lock in the steal.
Life Leech favors attrition, returning health over time after each hit rather than instantly. It rewards sustained fights over single burst kills.
